title: rubus candicans var. argyropsis
intro: Rubus candicans var. argyropsis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or White Himalayan Raspberry, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
